notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Access your classes.
login.errorUnconfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
login.errorGeneric: We couldn't sign you in right now. Please try again.
login.confirmedBanner: Email confirmed! Now just sign in with your password.
login.confirmFailedBanner: We could not confirm your email — the link may have expired. Try signing in or sign up again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start your climb: create an account and access the beta cohort classes.
signup.name: Full name
signup.errorInUse: This email already has an account. Try signing in.
signup.errorWeak: Password too weak. Use at least 8 characters, mixing letters and numbers.
signup.errorGeneric: We couldn't create your account right now. Please try again.
signup.errorMismatch: Passwords do not match. Please check and try again.

verify.title: Confirm your email
verify.text: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Click the link to activate your account — then just sign in.

dashboard.title: My courses
dashboard.subtitle: Your cohorts and available courses.
dashboard.empty: No courses available yet. Check back soon!

course.notEnrolled: You are not enrolled in this course yet. Go back to the dashboard to join the cohort.

lesson.noVideo: This lesson's video is not available yet.
